content.title: EK code
content.section_hierarchy: Instant Supply > Instant Paper Full Regression > 1-High > Enroll flow > Enroll with paper-MOOBE > V2 flow + Instant Paper > Enroll Summary Page > Billing > Special Offer Benefits (SOB)
content.preconditions: Launch HP Smart app. Start the enrollment flow and login with a valid account that has one or more subscriptions. Continue the enrollment flow to Enroll Summary page where the Billing card with the "Enter promo or PIN code" link is visible.
content.action: Launch the "InstantInk Web Application" using the "https://instantink-stage1.hpconnectedstage.com/us/en/l/v2".
content.expected_result: The "InstantInk Landing" page is displayed and the "SignUp" button is visible at the top-right corner on the "InstantInk Landing" page.

content.action: Click the "Accept" button on the "Privacy Banner" pop-up window.
content.expected_result: The "Privacy Banner" is visible on the "InstantInk Landing" page before clicking, and the "Privacy Banner" is dismissed on the "InstantInk Landing" page after clicking.

content.action: Click the "Sign in" button on the "InstantInk Landing" page.
content.expected_result: The page is redirected to the HPID Sign In page and the "Email" input field is visible.

content.action: Enter the valid email id of the existing account (with one or more subscriptions) and click continue.
content.expected_result: The provided email id is accepted.

content.action: Enter the valid password and click continue.
content.expected_result: The password is accepted and the user is redirected to the enroll setup page.

content.action: Open the "PortalShell URL" using "https://consumer.stage.portalshell.int.hp.com".
content.expected_result: The "PortalShell" page opens and the "Side Menu" Toggle is visible on the "PortalShell" page.

content.action: Click the "Side Menu Toggle" button on the "PortalShell" page.
content.expected_result: The "Side Menu Panel" expands on the "PortalShell Page" with text "HP Instant Ink Menu Item".

content.action: Click the "HP Instant Ink Menu" button on the "PortalShell" page.
content.expected_result: The "Instant Ink Module" opens in the "PortalShell" page.

content.action: Open the "OSS Emulator URL" using the URL: "https://oss.hpconnectedstage.com/emulate/v9".
content.expected_result: The "OSS Emulator" page opens and the "Dev Tab" button is visible on the "OSS Emulator" page.

content.action: Click the "Dev Tab" button on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "Dev Section" is active and all emulator controls are visible on the "OSS Emulator" page with tenant field textbox "Email" is displayed.

content.action: Enter value in the Tenant "Email" textbox field in the "Tenant/Printer Emulator Fields" section on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The Tenant "Email" textbox field is populated with the valid email address.

content.action: Enter value in the "Tenant ID" field in the "Tenant/Printer Emulator Fields" section on the "OSS Emulator" page (if required).
content.expected_result: The "Tenant ID" field is populated with the valid tenant ID.

content.action: Enter value in the "Printer Claim Code / Printer Identifier" textbox field in the "Tenant/Printer Emulator Fields" section on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "Printer Claim Code / Printer Identifier" textbox field is populated with the valid value.

content.action: Enter value in the "Serial Number / Device ID" field in the "Tenant/Printer Emulator Fields" section on the "OSS Emulator" page (if required).
content.expected_result: The "Serial Number / Device ID" field is populated with the valid value.

content.action: Click the "HPID Login" button/link in the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "OSS Authentication" is completed with alert message "Cookies loaded" and the "Yeti 3m" Button is visible on the "OSS Emulator" page.

content.action: Click the "Yeti 3m" button on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "3m Profile" is selected on the "OSS Emulator" page with a toggle "Gen2" is true.

content.action: Click the "App Type" button control on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "App Type" Options List is displayed on the "OSS Emulator" page.

content.action: Select the required value from the "App Type" Options List on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The selected value is shown in the "App Type" control on the "OSS Emulator" page with respective text.

content.action: Click the "Start Flow" button on the "OSS Emulator" page.
content.expected_result: The "OOBE Emulator Flow" starts on the "OSS Emulator Page" with button "Accept All" is displayed.

content.action: Click "Accept All" button on the "Connected Printing Services" page with text "Connected Printing Services".
content.expected_result: The "Connected Printing Services Step" is accepted and the page with text "Country Selection Step" page is displayed.

content.action: Click the "Country Option" button (if shown) on the "Country Selection" page.
content.expected_result: The "Country Option" is selected and displayed on the "Country Selection" page.

content.action: Click the "Country Continue" button (if shown) on the "Country Selection" page.
content.expected_result: The "Country Selection Step" is completed and "Do Not Activate HP+" button is displayed.

content.action: Click the "Do Not Activate HP+" option on the "HP+ Step" page.
content.expected_result: The "HP+ Decline Option" is selected on the "HP+ Step".

content.action: Click the "Decline HP+" confirmation on the "HP+ Confirmation Step" page.
content.expected_result: The "HP+" activation is declined on the "HP+ Confirmation Step".

content.action: Click the "Continue" button on the "Dynamic Security Notice" page.
content.expected_result: The "Dynamic Security Step" is completed and "Continue" button on "Value Proposition" page is displayed.

content.action: Click the "Continue" button on the "Value Proposition" step.
content.expected_result: The "Continue" button on the "Automatic Printer Updates" page is displayed.

content.action: Click the "Continue" button on the "Automatic Printer Updates" page.
content.expected_result: "HP Checkout Option" page with "HP Checkout" button is displayed.

content.action: Click the "HP Checkout" button on the "HP Checkout Option" page.
content.expected_result: "Plan Card" is displayed on the "Plan Selection" page.

content.action: Click the "Plan Card" on the "Plan Selection" page.
content.expected_result: The selected "Plan Card" is highlighted on the "Plan Selection" page.

content.action: Click the "Select Plan" button on the "Plan Selection" page.
content.expected_result: The "Plan Selection" is confirmed and the "Enroll Summary" page is displayed with the "Shipping Details Card" (pre-populated from existing account), "Billing Details Card" with the "Enter promo or PIN code" link, and the "Continue" button visible.

content.action: Click the "Enter promo or PIN code" link on the "Billing" card on the "Enroll Summary" page.
content.expected_result: The "Special Offer Benefits (SOB)" modal is displayed well with the "Special Offers" section and input field visible.

content.action: Enter a valid EK code in the input box on the "Special Offers" section of the "SOB" modal.
content.expected_result: The EK code is entered in the input box and the "Apply" button is enabled on the "SOB" modal.

content.action: Verify the "Apply" button is enabled on the "SOB" modal.
content.expected_result: The "Apply" button is displayed as enabled (clickable) on the "SOB" modal.

content.action: Click the "Apply" button on the "SOB" modal.
content.expected_result: The EK code is applied successfully and the applied successfully message is displayed well on the "SOB" modal.

content.action: Verify the "Breakdown of credits" section on the "SOB" modal after applying the EK code.
content.expected_result: The appropriate free months info is displayed well in the "Breakdown of credits" section on the "SOB" modal.

content.action: Close the "Special Offer Benefits (SOB)" modal by clicking the "X" button.
content.expected_result: The "SOB" modal is closed and the user is redirected back to the "Enroll Summary" page.

content.action: Verify the "Your Plan" card on the "Enroll Summary" page after applying the EK code.
content.expected_result: The trial end date on the "Your Plan" card gets appropriately modified after applying the EK code.

content.action: Verify the "Free months" info below the "Billing" card on the "Enroll Summary" page.
content.expected_result: The correct free months value is displayed below the "Billing" card on the "Enroll Summary" page.
